title: One Punch Man Addonpack
description: This Palladium addonpack gives you the abilities of characters from One Punch Man
body:
# **One Punch Man Palladium Addon**
# Characters
- Saitama/Caped Baldy 👊
- Genos/Demon Cyborg 🤖
# How to obtain Saitama's strength
1. Craft and wear a tracksuit.
2. Use your 30 XP levels to unlock the "Begin Training Regimen" ability.
3. Exercise as much as possible to enhance your stats:
 - Sprinting/squating increases speed
 - Punching increases strength
 - Jumping increases agility

  Once your energy bar is full, your limiter will break.
To remove your powers, consume a Limiter Pill.

# How to obtain Genos's cyborg armor
1. craft an equipment table
2. convert a villager into an engineer with the table
3. trade with the engineer to get appendages, weapons, and upgrades
 - cyborg arms provide strength
 - the cyborg torso provides durability and toughness
 - cyborg legs provide speed and agility
  
Genos's core is required to use weapons. The core has a power system (which is displayed in the energy bar) and your extensions are linked to it. The stronger the weapon, the more power it consumes. Lastly, to remove your cyborg parts, use an Impairment chip to remove your armor/powers.

**Planned Content**
- Telekinesis/Esper Powers
- Martial Arts/Enhanced Physical Prowess
- Superhuman speed
